differential_diagnoses: Autoimmune encephalitis (e.g., anti-LGI1 or anti-NMDA receptor encephalitis)
Psychogenic nonepileptic seizures (PNES) with comorbid epilepsy
next_steps: Perform lumbar puncture for CSF analysis (including autoimmune encephalitis panel and paraneoplastic antibodies)
Order serum autoimmune encephalitis and paraneoplastic antibody panels
Obtain whole-body PET/CT to screen for occult malignancy
Continue continuous video-EEG monitoring to rule out ongoing subclinical status epilepticus
Consult psychiatry for evaluation of acute psychosis and agitation
Consider trial of empiric pulse corticosteroids or intravenous immunoglobulin (IVIG) if autoimmune etiology is highly suspected
Review all current medication profiles to ensure no drug-drug interactions or toxicities
